---
title: "Week 5 --- Data Visualisation"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 5 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Matplotlib Foundations | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Seaborn Statistical Charts | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Interactive Plots | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
